# Product Catalog Module

Module ID: product-catalog
Status: draft
Purpose: Product and category catalog with SKU uniqueness, external mappings, combo products, and catalog events.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Owned tables: catalog_categories, products, product_category_assignments, combo_products, domain_events
Primary use cases: createCategory, listCategories, createProduct, updateProduct, getProduct, listProducts, expandProductComponents
Invariants: SKU is unique per tenant, external references are unique per tenant/source, money is integer cents, simple products cannot own combo components, combo components cannot reference missing products or themselves.
